title: polyscias balfouriana
intro: Polyscias balfouriana, also known as the 'Balfour's Mast Tree' or 'Polyscias', is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Seychelles. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties. Polyscias balfouriana has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used in herbal preparations, such as creams and ointments, for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
